title: OCP Proof Format v1
description: Machine-readable schema for Observation Commitment Protocol proof artifacts.

fileName.description: Human-readable file or artifact name. Descriptive only; not used for cryptographic verification.

hash.description: SHA-256 digest of the observation as a 0x-prefixed lowercase hexadecimal string.

txHash.description: Public ledger transaction hash containing the commitment.

network.description: Network identifier where the transaction was recorded, e.g. base-sepolia.

contract.description: Contract address or ledger commitment target.

extractionRule.description: Deterministic rule describing how to extract the committed digest from the transaction.

timestamp.description: Producer-supplied timestamp in milliseconds since Unix epoch. Informational only.
